title: crotalaria kostermansii
intro: Crotalaria kostermansii, also known as the Kostermans's rattlebox, is a plant species belonging to the legume family, Fabaceae. It is a shrub native to tropical Asia, valued for its medicinal properties and health benefits. The plant is traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. Crotalaria kostermansii can be prepared as a decoction or infusion for herbal remedies, often consumed as a tea to promote overall well-being.
